title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google launched Antigravity 2.0, an AI-powered code editor evolved into an agent control tower that automates code building, testing, and management. Powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash, the tool forces developers into an agentic workflow where AI agents work in parallel, marking a shift from traditional coding to AI agent supervision.
